mapper.sql: trade_id, business_no, trade_type, status, branch_code, customer_id, customer_name, base_currency, quote_currency, currency_pair, notional_amount, counter_amount, trade_direction, value_date, trade_date, maturity_date, delivery_type, settlement_method, spot_rate, customer_rate, cost_rate, branch_profit_point, special_trade_type, original_trade_type, original_trade_id, related_trade_id, netting_currency, netting_account, netting_amount, maker_id, checker_id, authorizer_id, make_time, check_time, authorize_time, purpose_code, fx_purpose_code, rcpmis_report_flag, rcpmis_report_time, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT t.trade_id, t.business_no, t.trade_type, t.status, t.branch_code, o.org_name AS branch_name, t.customer_id, t.customer_name, t.base_currency, t.quote_currency, t.currency_pair, t.notional_amount, t.counter_amount, t.trade_direction, t.value_date, t.trade_date, t.maturity_date, t.delivery_type, t.settlement_method, t.spot_rate, t.customer_rate, t.cost_rate, t.branch_profit_point, t.special_trade_type, t.original_trade_type, t.original_trade_id, t.related_trade_id, t.netting_currency, t.netting_account, t.netting_amount, t.maker_id, t.checker_id, t.authorizer_id, t.make_time, t.check_time, t.authorize_time, t.purpose_code, t.fx_purpose_code, t.rcpmis_report_flag, t.rcpmis_report_time, t.version, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM fx_trade_master t LEFT JOIN fx_org o ON t.branch_code = o.org_code WHERE t.trade_id = #{tradeId}
SELECT FROM fx_trade_master ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT t.trade_id, t.business_no, t.trade_type, t.status, t.branch_code, o.org_name AS branch_name, t.customer_id, t.customer_name, t.base_currency, t.quote_currency, t.currency_pair, t.notional_amount, t.counter_amount, t.trade_direction, t.value_date, t.trade_date, t.maturity_date, t.delivery_type, t.settlement_method, t.spot_rate, t.customer_rate, t.cost_rate, t.branch_profit_point, t.special_trade_type, t.original_trade_type, t.original_trade_id, t.related_trade_id, t.netting_currency, t.netting_account, t.netting_amount, t.maker_id, t.checker_id, t.authorizer_id, t.make_time, t.check_time, t.authorize_time, t.purpose_code, t.fx_purpose_code, t.rcpmis_report_flag, t.rcpmis_report_time, t.version, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM fx_trade_master t LEFT JOIN fx_org o ON t.branch_code = o.org_code
ORDER BY t.make_time DESC, t.trade_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_trade_master (trade_id, business_no, trade_type, status, branch_code, customer_id, customer_name, base_currency, quote_currency, currency_pair, notional_amount, counter_amount, trade_direction, value_date, trade_date, maturity_date, delivery_type, settlement_method, spot_rate, customer_rate, cost_rate, branch_profit_point, special_trade_type, original_trade_type, original_trade_id, related_trade_id, netting_currency, netting_account, netting_amount, maker_id, checker_id, authorizer_id, make_time, check_time, authorize_time, purpose_code, fx_purpose_code, rcpmis_report_flag, rcpmis_report_time, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{businessNo}, #{tradeType}, #{status}, #{branchCode}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{baseCurrency}, #{quoteCurrency}, #{currencyPair}, #{notionalAmount}, #{counterAmount}, #{tradeDirection}, #{valueDate}, #{tradeDate}, #{maturityDate}, #{deliveryType}, #{settlementMethod}, #{spotRate}, #{customerRate}, #{costRate}, #{branchProfitPoint}, #{specialTradeType}, #{originalTradeType}, #{originalTradeId}, #{relatedTradeId}, #{nettingCurrency}, #{nettingAccount}, #{nettingAmount}, #{makerId}, #{checkerId}, #{authorizerId}, #{makeTime}, #{checkTime}, #{authorizeTime}, #{purposeCode}, #{fxPurposeCode}, #{rcpmisReportFlag}, #{rcpmisReportTime}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_trade_master SET status = #{status}, checker_id = #{checkerId}, check_time = #{checkTime}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE fx_trade_master SET status = #{status}, branch_code = #{branchCode}, customer_id = #{customerId}, customer_name = #{customerName}, base_currency = #{baseCurrency}, quote_currency = #{quoteCurrency}, currency_pair = #{currencyPair}, notional_amount = #{notionalAmount}, counter_amount = #{counterAmount}, trade_direction = #{tradeDirection}, value_date = #{valueDate}, trade_date = #{tradeDate}, maturity_date = #{maturityDate}, delivery_type = #{deliveryType}, settlement_method = #{settlementMethod}, spot_rate = #{spotRate}, customer_rate = #{customerRate}, cost_rate = #{costRate}, branch_profit_point = #{branchProfitPoint}, special_trade_type = #{specialTradeType}, purpose_code = #{purposeCode}, fx_purpose_code = #{fxPurposeCode}, maker_id = #{makerId}, make_time = #{makeTime}, checker_id = #{checkerId}, check_time = #{checkTime}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE fx_trade_master SET settlement_method = #{settlementMethod}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(trade_date) AS last_trade_date, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(trade_date)) AS recency_days, COUNT(*) AS frequency_12m, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(counter_amount, notional_amount * COALESCE(spot_rate, customer_rate, 0))), 0) AS monetary_12m_cny FROM fx_trade_master WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) AND status IN ('ACTIVE','MATURED','SETTLED','CLOSED','ROLLED_OVER','EARLY_SETTLED','EXERCISED','PREMIUM_SETTLED')

SELECT FROM fx_trade_master WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND status IN ('ACTIVE','MATURED','SETTLED','CLOSED','ROLLED_OVER','EARLY_SETTLED','EXERCISED','PREMIUM_SETTLED') ORDER BY trade_date DESC
